name: MITSUI O.S.K. LINES LTD. Regist
summary: MITSUI O.S.K. LINES LTD. Regist is a Japanese shipping company operating a diverse fleet of vessels, including containerships, bulk carriers, tankers, and car carriers. The company provides transportation services for a wide range of cargo worldwide. Mitsui O.S.K. Lines is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
